subject: [PATCH v2 11/14] fuse: add pinned headers capability for io-uring buffer rings

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch adds the capability to pin header buffers for io-uring buffer rings in fuse servers. It introduces a new flag, FUSE_URING_PINNED_HEADERS, which can be set alongside FUSE_URING_BUFRING on REGISTER sqes. When enabled, the kernel pins the header pages and uses direct memcpy for copying, reducing per-request overhead. The patch also includes changes to account pinned pages against RLIMIT_MEMLOCK and track mm->pinned_vm. Unpinning is done in process context during connection abort.
